title: TrustFramework
description: System-managed trust framework definition for ICAO, AAMVA, EUDI, or custom identity ecosystems. Immutable at the system level; organisations reference frameworks via OrganizationTrustProfile.

code.description: Short immutable identifier, e.g. ICAO, AAMVA, EUDI, CUSTOM

pkd_endpoints.description: Public Key Directory endpoints for automatic CSCA/DSC fetching (e.g. ICAO PKD, AAMVA IACA list)

default_algorithms.description: Cryptographic algorithms mandated by this framework

default_formats.description: Credential formats mandated or recommended by this framework

validation_ruleset.description: Framework-specific validation rules (clock skew, chain length, revocation modes, etc.)

sync_config.description: Configuration for periodic trust anchor refresh (interval, retry policy)

is_system.description: true = platform-managed; false = custom org-defined framework
